consignor.motivation: Consignor in certificate is 'Berg Prop Prod. AB' while invoice issuer is 'Berg Propulsion Production AB'. The names differ by more than allowed minor variations (missing words and different wording). Addresses differ. The name difference cannot be resolved by allowed rules but the invoice company name strongly resembles the certificate consignor's name to suggest possible commercial vs registered name difference. However, post address differs (Tärnvägen 15 vs Långesand 1) and the exact match of business identifiers is not shown. Therefore, conservatively manual review is required to confirm consignor identity (rules 4.1.3.1 and 4.1.3.4).

consignee.motivation: Consignee names and address information in certificate and invoice match closely after normalization. The full consignee name 'HALUL OFFSHORE SERVICES COMPANY W.L' in certificate matches 'HALUL OFFSHORE SERVICES COMPANY W.L.L' in invoice except for legal form abbreviation difference accepted by rule 4.2.2.1. Address fields and contact details also correspond. Thus consignee is confirmed MATCH.

goods_description.invoice_value: Multiple specific articles including items with HS Codes and COO noted, for example 'O-RING', 'SEALKIT', with various quantities and weights, but no direct text matching the 4 cases packaging dimensions stated in certificate.
goods_description.motivation: Certificate specifies 4 cases with specific dimensions and weights. Invoice lists multiple line items with HS codes and country of origin but lacks direct textual match to these case descriptions or general goods description in certificate. No article numbers in certificate to prioritize. Because of lack of explicit item-to-invoice line verification and no direct textual match, goods description verification is set to MANUAL_REVIEW.

quantity.invoice_value: Quantities and weights per individual items listed but no total '4 Cases' expression found as a verified quantity. Multiple small quantities seen but no verification that 4 cases packaging quantity is confirmed.
quantity.motivation: Certificate states quantity as '4 Cases' representing packaging. Invoice lists quantities per line with no explicit mention of combined or total case quantity. The '4 Cases' packaging quantity cannot be identified or verified in invoice text. As no general invoice reference permits acceptance and no quantity values match '4 Cases', the quantity verification results in MISMATCH.

origin.certificate_value: SE, DE, GB, CH, IT, ES, TW, AT
origin.invoice_value: Invoice lines list country of origin fields with countries including Sweden, Germany, United Kingdom, Switzerland, Italy, Spain, Taiwan, Austria matching all certificate listed origins.
origin.motivation: All origin countries listed in certificate (Sweden, Germany, UK, Switzerland, Italy, Spain, Taiwan, Austria) appear explicitly as 'Country of origin' in several invoice line items. EU origin normalization rules apply since certificate states 'European Union', allowing some flexibility. No conflicting or missing origin found. Result is MATCH.

overall_assessment.decision_summary: Consignor name in certificate ('Berg Prop Prod. AB') does not fully match invoice issuer name ('Berg Propulsion Production AB'). Quantity '4 Cases' from certificate cannot be verified in the invoice. Goods description cannot be clearly matched. Origin and consignee match successfully.
overall_assessment.human_explanation: Consignornamnet i certifikatet skiljer sig från fakturans utställare. Kvantiteten "4 Cases" kan inte verifieras i fakturan. Varubeskrivningen är oklar och kräver manuell granskning. Ursprungsland och mottagare stämmer.
